global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with product displays and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting a product with a discount and free shipping offer.

elements.label: Abstract orange background

elements.label: Stylized product display
elements.description: Two stylized mirrors or glass panels positioned vertically, reflecting light and adding depth.

elements.label: VantaStyle logo
elements.description: The logo 'VantaStyle' displayed in a modern font, positioned at the top left corner.

elements.label: Main promotional text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Your next favorite pick' prominently displayed in the center.

elements.label: Shipping offer text
elements.description: Smaller white text below the main text stating 'Free shipping over $25'.

elements.label: Discount badge
elements.description: A small badge in the bottom left corner displaying '-30%' in a bold font.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom with the text 'Watch now' encouraging user interaction.
